title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official CLI and library for running Llama 2, Mistral, Gemma, and other large language models locally with minimal setup.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python SDK for Ollama: chat, generate embeddings, pull/list models, and stream responses with a few lines of code.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript SDK for Node, Deno & browsers; chat, stream, and embed via the same REST API.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration package exposing Ollama models as LLMs, chat, and embedding components.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Open-source ChatGPT-style web interface for Ollama; manage models, chat in threads, multi-user, dark/light themes.

title: ollama4j
summary: Unofficial Java client for Ollama with fluent API, streaming, embeddings, and custom timeout support.

title: ollama-rb
summary: Community Ruby gem wrapping Ollama REST API; chat, generate, embeddings, and model management.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Enhanced interactive CLI for Ollama with conversation history, syntax highlighting, and prompt templates.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: Experimental GitHub Copilot-like plugin for VS Code that uses local Ollama models for inline suggestions.

title: ollama-docker
summary: Official Docker image and compose stacks for CPU & GPU (CUDA/ROCm) inference with Ollama.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Community Helm chart deploying Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU node-selector and autoscaling options.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration by deepset allowing Ollama models as generators or embedders in RAG pipelines.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: Unofficial C# .NET client for Ollama with async streaming, chat, and embeddings; targets .NET Standard 2.0.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Community Rust crate wrapping Ollama REST API with Tokio-based async client and typed payloads.

title: ollama-dagger
summary: Dagger module that spins up Ollama service inside CI pipelines for testing LLM-powered features.

title: ollama-n8n
summary: Native n8n node to call Ollama chat & generate endpoints in no-code workflows.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Self-hosted Discord bot that streams Ollama replies into channels or threads with slash commands.

title: ollama-logseq
summary: Logseq plugin inserting local LLM assistance via Ollama for summarizing blocks or generating content.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Official example repo showing how to build a minimal RAG pipeline combining Ollama embeddings & generation.

title: ollama-obsidian
summary: Obsidian community plugin bringing local LLM assistance to notes using Ollama for summarization and Q&A.
